title: Add organizer contacts
objective: Replace the homepage contact placeholder with confirmed organizer names and email addresses for Yash Turkar and Karthik Dantu.
instructions: Edit the public homepage contact section in index.html.
Replace placeholder contact copy with Yash Turkar (yashturk@buffalo.edu) and Karthik Dantu (kdantu@buffalo.edu).
Keep the existing single-page structure and current section layout intact.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Limit implementation scope to the requested contact update unless a minimal formatting tweak is required for clarity.
expected_outputs: Updated homepage contact section with the two organizer contacts.
definition_of_done: index.html shows both organizer names and email addresses in the Contact section.
ResultPacket lists changed artifacts and any doc implications.
